_description: Configuration schema documentation for Company Auto Proxy. Not used for runtime validation (PS 5.1 lacks Test-Json). Serves as reference for field types and constraints.

upstream_proxies.constraints: At least one URL matching http(s)://host:port
upstream_proxies.description: Corporate proxy servers to forward matching traffic through

ssid_pattern.description: WiFi SSID pattern to detect corporate network

auto_switch.description: Automatically switch proxy mode based on network

dashboard_enabled.description: Enable web dashboard on control port

level.constraints: One of: debug, info, warn, error (fallback: info)

max_entries.description: Maximum log entries retained in memory buffer

auto_start.description: Register scheduled task for auto-start at logon
